examples.title: Smart Contract Example
examples.description: This is an example of a simple smart contract written in Solidity.
examples.explanation: This smart contract has a single function called getOwner that returns the address of the owner of the contract.

examples.title: DAO Example
examples.description: This is an example of a simple DAO written in Solidity.
examples.explanation: This DAO has two functions: deposit and withdraw. The deposit function allows users to deposit Ether into the DAO, and the withdraw function allows users to withdraw Ether from the DAO.
